# Data Model Checklist: Ingest open geospatial datasets

**Purpose**: Ensure ingestion entities and fields cover validation, QA, promotion, and provenance.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/017-geospatial-ingest/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Core Entities

- [x] CHK-DM-001 Ingestion run entity captures run ID, status, timestamps, and trigger type.
- [x] CHK-DM-002 Dataset source entity stores provenance (source name, version, license, file format, expected schema).
- [x] CHK-DM-003 Validation results capture schema, geometry, and CRS outcomes.
- [x] CHK-DM-004 QA results capture row counts, spatial sanity, and duplicates.
- [x] CHK-DM-005 Promotion results capture atomic swap status and errors.

## Auditability

- [x] CHK-DM-006 Run reports retain warnings and failure details for audits.
